channel.title: Research | data science on Jinsong Zhang
channel.description: Recent content in Research | data science on Jinsong Zhang

item.title: leukemia prognosis in shiny
item.description: I hosted a shiny page which is used to show how expression of any given genes is correlated with the prognosis of acute myeloid leukemia. After reading the post that Blogdown can be used to host a shiny page (https://liuyanguu.github.io/post/2019/02/24/shiny-in-blogdown/), I wanted to test if this works for my shiny page as well.
